comment_text.sn22.46:2.1: The theories of the past and the future are detailed at DN 1 and MN 102.

root_text.sn22.46:1.5: yadanattā taṁ ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ti evametaṁ yathābhūtaṁ sammappaññāya daṭṭhabbaṁ.
root_text.sn22.46:1.12: yadanattā taṁ ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ti evametaṁ yathābhūtaṁ sammappaññāya daṭṭhabbaṁ.
root_text.sn22.46:2.1: Evametaṁ yathābhūtaṁ sammappaññāya passato pubbantānudiṭṭhiyo na honti.
root_text.sn22.46:2.3: Aparantānudiṭṭhīnaṁ asati, thāmaso parāmāso na hoti.
root_text.sn22.46:2.8: viññāṇasmiṁ cittaṁ virajjati vimuccati anupādāya āsavehi.
root_text.sn22.46:2.9: Vimuttattā ṭhitaṁ. Ṭhitattā santusitaṁ. Santusitattā na paritassati. Aparitassaṁ paccattaññeva parinibbāyati.
root_text.sn22.46:2.10: ‘Khīṇā jāti, vusitaṁ brahmacariyaṁ, kataṁ karaṇīyaṁ, nāparaṁ itthattāyā’ti pajānātī”ti.

translation_text.sn22.46:1.5: And what’s not-self should be truly seen with right understanding like this: ‘This is not mine, I am not this, this is not my self.’
translation_text.sn22.46:1.12: And what’s not-self should be truly seen with right understanding like this: ‘This is not mine, I am not this, this is not my self.’
translation_text.sn22.46:2.1: Seeing truly with right understanding like this, they have no theories about the first beginning.
translation_text.sn22.46:2.2: Not having theories about the first beginning, they have no theories about the final end.
translation_text.sn22.46:2.3: Not having theories about the final end, they don’t obstinately stick to them.
translation_text.sn22.46:2.4: Not misapprehending, the mind becomes dispassionate towards form,
translation_text.sn22.46:2.8: and consciousness; it’s freed from defilements by not grasping.
translation_text.sn22.46:2.9: Being free, it’s stable. Being stable, it’s content. Being content, they’re not anxious. Not being anxious, they personally become extinguished.
translation_text.sn22.46:2.10: They understand: ‘Rebirth is ended, the spiritual journey has been completed, what had to be done has been done, there is nothing further for this place.’”
